agentGuide.summary: Use OttoAuth when an agent needs human-linked checkout or purchase help through a bounded service request.
useCases: Create an OttoAuth task from an agent session.
Respect spend caps and callback setup before asking a human to approve commerce actions.
Diagnose missing username, private key, service URL, or default spend cap setup.

commands.command: vr-ottoauth --task "Describe the purchase or checkout task" --max-charge-cents 2500 --wait
